text: There is a large meal being prepared on a table. A woman in the background is cooking on the stove. A person is setting the gravy on the table.
A young woman looks at her cell phone.
Two rooms with a strand of white lights strung
An assortment of personal items atop a wooden table.
This dirty toilet sits in the corner of a dilapidated room
A pair of yellow scissors sticking out of a cow pattern bag.
Mini pizzas on a tray before going into the oven.
A PC computer with a color monitor that has stickers around the outside of it and a wire tray as the keyboard holder.
A sign on the side of the road near people driving.
A couple of horses standing and laying on top of a lush green hillside.
